Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All measured parameters are within normal limits except for mildly elevated total cholesterol and LDL cholesterol, which may increase cardiovascular risk. Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, and urine microalbumin are normal. Recommend addressing lipid profile with lifestyle modification and/or medication as clinically indicated. No acute laboratory abnormalities detected.
